text.title: AI Incident Postmortem Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure from incident close to archived postmortem.

step.name: gather-facts
step.input: Incident tracker ticket; observability logs; eval results pre/post.
step.action: Extract time window, traces, prompt versions, model versions, eval results before/after.

step.name: classify-root-cause
step.action: Pick root_cause_class from enum; fill ml_axes object.
step.decision-gate: If class is "other", require ≥2-sentence justification and consider proposing a new enum entry.

step.name: quantify-blast-radius
step.action: Compute users_affected (or bounded range), revenue_usd_impact, detect/mitigate/resolve durations.

step.name: add-eval-guard
step.action: Author a test case for this incident; commit to eval set; bump eval_set_version. OR document why no guard is feasible.

step.name: compose-and-archive
step.action: Compose postmortem per content/02-output-contract.xml; run scripts/validate-output.py; route to incident commander; archive on sign-off.
